response.original_title: ヌードモデルNTR 上司と羞恥に溺れた妻の衝撃的浮気映像 南波明花
response.overview: My wife, Akika, and I have been married for 10 years now. We have never had a fight, and to anyone who sees us, we are a loving couple. I believed that our happy life would continue forever. Until that incident happened... One day, on our wedding anniversary, Akika suggested a nude photoshoot. It was my wife's wish to let loose at least once in her life... I couldn't shake off my embarrassment and couldn't give an answer. So I confided my dilemma to my boss, Takimoto. Takimoto seemed excited and insisted that we do the photoshoot that very day, saying he knew a photographer.
response.title: Nude Model NTR: Shocking Footage of a Wife's Affair with Her Boss, Drowning in Shame - Haruka Namba
